codeReview.summary: The migration correctly replaces DroidAcpTransport with PiAcpTransport for the DroidAcp agent type. The factory now spawns 'droid exec --output-format acp' and uses the standard ACP initialize+authenticate handshake, sharing the same PiAcpTransport/AcpClient pipeline as PiAcp and GenericAcp. The deprecated DroidAcpTransport and stream_json modules are properly marked with #[deprecated] attributes and #[allow(deprecated)] in consuming test code. The import of DroidAcpTransport was removed from factory.rs. 5 new migration tests cover command correctness, transport type, ACP handshake protocol, factory routing, and session lifecycle. One test (droid_acp_migration_factory_no_droid_acp_transport) is an empty body that relies on a companion test for coverage — non-blocking.

issues.description: droid_acp_migration_factory_no_droid_acp_transport is an empty test body with no assertions. The comment explains it relies on droid_acp_migration_uses_pi_acp_transport for coverage, but the test itself doesn't verify anything at runtime. Consider adding a compile-time or runtime assertion (e.g., checking that the factory function signature only references PiAcpTransport types) or removing the test and consolidating the coverage claim into the companion test.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The droid binary's --output-format acp flag enables standard ACP JSON-RPC over NDJSON. This is a key integration detail that was not documented in the library before this change. The provider-transport.md was updated but could benefit from noting the minimum droid version that supports --output-format acp.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: factory.rs:147 — 'droid exec --output-format acp'; provider-transport.md updated with migration notes but no version requirement

summary: Clean, well-structured migration of DroidAcp from proprietary stream-json to standard ACP transport. The factory correctly uses PiAcpTransport for DroidAcp, the deprecated code is properly annotated, imports are cleaned up, and 5 new tests verify the migration. The provider-transport.md library doc was updated with migration notes. One non-blocking issue: an empty test body for VAL-ACP-012. The worker followed the rust-backend-worker skill procedure correctly.
